summary: Plan-only remediation inventory assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned. All listed PRs are non-security and hydrated; merge is blocked for each because the artifact does not include a complete merge preflight with passed Codex /review and addressed findings. #79811 has an actionable Codex review-bot finding, so it needs branch repair rather than merge.

actions.reason: Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; merge recommendation is blocked only by missing merge preflight, not by an unresolved maintainer decision.
Useful contributor PR with a narrow repair needed on the contributor branch before it can become merge-ready.
Executable repair artifact is safe for a narrow contributor-branch repair.
Independent docs PR appears healthy, but plan mode cannot recommend merge without complete merge preflight.
Independent already-repaired contributor PR; no additional executable repair is identified from the hydrated artifact, but merge preflight is incomplete.
Independent ready-for-maintainer PR; merge recommendation is blocked only by missing merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #79811 on the contributor branch so filtered identity-less outbound sends cannot leave stale delivery metadata from earlier payloads. The repair should keep the contributor PR as the source path and preserve indulgeback's credit.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(outbound): avoid stale delivery ids after filtering empty receipts
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/79811.

This keeps the original contributor PR as the canonical path and preserves credit for @indulgeback. The narrow repair addresses the Codex review-bot finding that filtering identity-less send results can leave stale messageId/delivery metadata from earlier payloads.

Validation:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/deliver.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent.direct-delivery-core-channels.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
credit_notes: Contributor credit: indulgeback authored the original fix(outbound): ignore empty delivery receipts commit.
Keep repair commits on the contributor PR where possible because maintainer_can_modify=true.
